work_experience.title: Head of Quality & Product Service, Expondo Polska Sp. z o.o., Zielona Góra, Poland

production quality and OEM readiness.
Served as primary contact for OEM customers and certification bodies, reducing audit
nonconformities and improving supplier transparency.
